failure.message:
1. Test Case ID: HWLRg1
- Server error
[500] Internal Server Error:
`{"error":"Failed to create scraping job: could not translate host name \"dpg-d7chlqt7vvec73b700ng-a\" to address: Name or service not known\n","timestamp":"2026-04-18T19:02:39.039838+00:00"}`
Reproduce with:
curl -X POST -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"chunking_config": {}, "crawl_config": {}, "metadata": {"source": "openapi-example"}, "url": "https://www.city.gov/housing/guide", "user_id": "schemathesis"}' https://vecinita-gateway-lx27.onrender.com/api/v1/modal-jobs/scraper
